original_question: What proportion of ICU patients developed thrombocytopenia (platelet count < 50 K/µL), hypotension (mean arterial pressure < 65 mmHg), or an elevated shock index, and what was their in-hospital mortality?
interpretation_summary: In-hospital mortality rate over the ICU cohort meeting ANY of three value-defined conditions: platelets < 50 K/uL (lab_value), MAP < 65 mmHg (vital_value), or an elevated shock index (derived_value — its formula and abnormal threshold are looked up from the literature). The three are OR'd via or_any; 'ICU patients' is the icu_stay filter; the proportion and its mortality come from the in-hospital mortality outcome concept with aggregation count.
